Localization.Description: Attempt to move a Vault engine

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} moved a Vault engine on host {event_src.host} from the directory with hash {datafield1} to the directory with hash {datafield2}

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to move a Vault engine on host {event_src.host} from the directory with hash {datafield1} to the directory with hash {datafield2}. Reason: "{reason}".
